role_description: Operations role - Handles initial data entry and submission of new records into the registry.
Operations role - Validates and verifies the accuracy of newly submitted intake records before further processing.
Operations role - Edits and updates existing registry records as part of ongoing data maintenance.
Operations role - Reviews and verifies changes made to registry records to ensure correctness and compliance.
Operations role - Approves verified registry changes, making them final and officially accepted.
Operations role - Manages and monitors data exchange between the registry and external systems.
Operations role - Has full operational control across the registry.
Configurations role - Configures core registry settings such as domain schemas, fields, and validation rules.
Configurations role - Sets up and manages configurations for integrations with external systems and APIs.
Configurations role - Maintains and updates reference/master data used across the registry.
Configurations role - Has full control over all configuration aspects, including registry, integrations, and reference data.
